name: Madison Goforth
summary: Studies the (meta)genomics of Campylobacter in low- and middle-income settings, including source-associated variation and antimicrobial resistance.

name: Eve Hallett
supervision: Co-supervised with Sam Sheppard and Paul Keim
summary: Investigates bacterial species boundaries, homologous recombination and the emergence of traits between Campylobacter jejuni and Campylobacter coli.

name: Henry Badji
supervision: Co-supervised with Jahangir Hossain and Ozan Gundogdu
summary: Works on genomic epidemiology and source attribution of enteric bacteria in The Gambia through GETcampy and the Campylobacter Control Campaign.
